el: Optional reference images to guide the style or content of the generated video (grok-imagine-video only).
en: Optional reference images to guide the style or content of the generated video (grok-imagine-video only).
zh: 可选的参考图，用于引导生成视频的风格或内容（仅 grok-imagine-video 支持）。

el: You can upload up to 4 reference images.
en: You can upload up to 4 reference images.
zh: 最多可上传 4 张参考图。
